title: ChatGPT Is Getting Its Biggest Upgrade Ever
summary: ChatGPT is undergoing a major overhaul to become a unified AI super app integrating coding tools, agents, image processing, third-party apps, and workplace automation. OpenAI is developing Lockdown Mode for data protection and collaborating with Broadcom on a custom 10-gigawatt AI accelerator.
writeup: The video reports on OpenAI's plans to expand ChatGPT from a chatbot into an AI super app, consolidating coding, agents, image tools, workplace automation, and security features into a single product. It frames the shift as part of a competitive push against Anthropic and Claude Code in the enterprise AI market. Key takeaways: the upgrade centers on agentic capabilities and workplace automation, and security additions include prompt injection defense.
